title: jasminum rivulare
intro: Jasminum rivulare, also known as Star Jasmine, is a climbing evergreen shrub native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and glossy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of insomnia, anxiety, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Jasminum rivulare include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
